sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75194" key="o)rneo/morfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνεό-μορφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bird-shaped,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:281" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">281</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
